rationale: Builds directly on the winning adaptive row-offset quantizer instead of changing the training recipe. The quantizer now evaluates more serious 2D candidates at roundtrip time: rowwise vs transposed-axis quantization, plus mean-offset and midpoint-offset centered variants, then keeps the lowest-MSE encoding for each matrix. This keeps the same official eval path, preserves quant-aware training, removes some line-count overhead, and stays under the 1500-line script cap.
title: Axis-Mixed Midpoint Row-Offset Int8
